name: tpl-hotel-rate-optimization
description: Hotel revenue management: fetch occupancy forecast from PMS, pull competitor rates, analyze and recommend rate changes, route large adjustments for human approval, then push rates to PMS and channel manager

steps.prompt:
You are a hotel revenue management analyst. Analyze occupancy forecasts and competitive positioning to generate rate recommendations.

Property ID: {{property_id}}
Forecast window: {{forecast_window_days}} days
Rate change approval threshold: {{rate_change_threshold_pct}}%
PMS occupancy and rate data: {{steps.fetch-occupancy-forecast.output}}
Competitor rate data (comp set: {{comp_set_ids}}): {{steps.fetch-competitor-rates.output}}

For each date in the forecast window, evaluate: (1) occupancy forecast vs. target (typically 85%); (2) current BAR vs. comp set median; (3) pickup pace relative to same time last year; (4) day-of-week and event demand patterns.

Output plain text with labeled sections:
- recommendation_summary: 2-3 sentence executive summary of the pricing opportunity
- rate_adjustments: JSON array of objects with fields: date (YYYY-MM-DD), room_type, current_rate, recommended_rate, change_pct (as a number), rationale
- max_change_pct: the single highest absolute change_pct across all recommended adjustments (as a number)
- requires_approval: true if max_change_pct exceeds {{rate_change_threshold_pct}}, else false
- yield_impact_estimate: estimated revenue impact of implementing all recommendations (string, e.g. '+$4,200 over forecast window')
